description: Implement FGAP-144: give the diagnostic/validator json-aggregate ops (context-validate, context-validate-relations, validate-roadmap) a size-narrowing axis paralleling the item-read family -- optional severity / block / code filters and/or offset+limit pagination so issues[] reads in bounded slices -- and make the json over-cap boundary refusal name the concrete narrowing parameter (mirroring the read channel's overCapDirective) instead of the mechanism-less 'Narrow your read.'
acceptance_criteria: context-validate, context-validate-relations, and validate-roadmap each accept a narrowing parameter set (severity/block/code filter and/or offset+limit) that bounds the returned issues[], with a unit pin per op
A synthetic over-cap validation result is retrievable in full through bounded slices -- the previously-unreachable case, pinned by a fixture that exceeds the 50KB cap
The json-channel over-cap refusal names the concrete narrowing parameter for ops that declare one, mirroring the read channel's directive shape
Unfiltered/unpaginated calls return the exact prior shape (regression -- additive parameters only)
build, check, and full test suite exit 0; docs-surface-sync applied (op descriptions, README statements about the validators, skill narrative if op strings change, CHANGELOG)
